tasks.instruction: Submit a commercial parking lot quote request for about 50 spaces specifying an asphalt resurfacing overlay with line striping, a 2-inch overlay thickness, a maximum budget of $15,000, a preferred start date 30 days from today, and a contact email.

Business Essentials Crack & Pothole Repair Package

tasks.instruction: Find a blog article about winter asphalt or parking lot care from the last 2 years whose title includes the word "checklist", then paste its URL at the start of a contact form message and ask for winter maintenance advice based on that checklist.

expected_values.message_suffix: Please advise on winter maintenance based on this checklist.

tasks.instruction: Locate the 24/7 emergency asphalt repair phone number on the site and submit an after-hours emergency asphalt repair request that begins the message with that phone number followed by a brief description of a hazardous pothole.
